task: Compute HEDIS Controlling High Blood Pressure (CBP) measure rate. Input: FHIR R4 Bundle of members + Observations. Output: { measure, numerator, denominator, rate, members[] }. Per NCQA MY 2024+ specification: members 18-85 with hypertension (ICD-10 I10), denominator = continuously enrolled with no break > 45 days, numerator = most recent BP in measurement period < 140/90 (or < 150/90 if 60-85 without diabetes).

recipes.name: hedis-cbp
recipes.source: function generate(input,lib){var b=(input&&input.bundle)||{},es=Array.isArray(b.entry)?b.entry:[],R=(lib.pack&&lib.pack.rules)||{},HT=R.hypertension_icd10||['I10'],DM=R.diabetes_icd10||['E11.65'],AB=R.age_bands||{},MY=(input&&input.measurement_year)||2024,P={},C={},O={};function pid(r){return r.subject&&(r.subject.reference||'').split('/').pop()||r.id||'';}for(var i=0;i<es.length;i++){var r=(es[i]&&es[i].resource)||{},t=r.resourceType||'',k=pid(r);if(t==='Patient')P[r.id||k]={bd:r.birthDate||null};else if(t==='Condition')(C[k]=C[k]||[]).push((r.code&&r.code.coding&&r.code.coding[0]||{}).code||'');else if(t==='Observation'){var s=null,d=null;(r.component||[]).forEach(function(x){var c=(x.code&&x.code.coding&&x.code.coding[0]||{}).code,v=x.valueQuantity&&x.valueQuantity.value;if(c==='8480-6')s=v;else if(c==='8462-4')d=v;});if(s!=null&&d!=null)(O[k]=O[k]||[]).push({date:r.effectiveDateTime||'',systolic:s,diastolic:d});}}var n=0,D=0,M=[];for(var k2 in P){var age=MY-parseInt((P[k2].bd||'1900').slice(0,4),10),cl=C[k2]||[],hT=cl.some(function(x){return HT.indexOf(x)>=0;}),hD=cl.some(function(x){return DM.indexOf(x)>=0;});if(!hT||age<18||age>85)continue;D++;var bn=age<=59?'18-59':(hD?'60-85_with_diabetes':'60-85_no_diabetes'),th=AB[bn]||{threshold_systolic:140,threshold_diastolic:90},L=(O[k2]||[]).slice().sort(function(a,b){return(b.date||'').localeCompare(a.date||'');})[0]||null,ok=L?(L.systolic<th.threshold_systolic&&L.diastolic<th.threshold_diastolic):false;if(ok)n++;M.push({member_id_redacted:'<hash>',age:age,age_band:bn,has_diabetes:hD,qualifying_bp_reading:L,controlled:ok});}return{measure:'CBP',spec:'NCQA HEDIS MY 2024+',numerator:n,denominator:D,rate:D?n/D:0,members:M};}

pack.description: HEDIS CBP rule library. hypertension_icd10 covers the I10-I15 essential and secondary hypertension family per ICD-10-CM. bp_loinc gives the real LOINC codes for systolic, diastolic, and the BP panel. age_bands pins the NCQA MY 2024+ thresholds.
